name: xtyle-components
title: Xtyle components
description: The host surface a xtyle component fragment fills: an inert template plus sandboxed hooks and handlers, rendered into the component's shadow root.

slots.description: The built-in fill for the xtyle Accordion component: the mod-zero markup and behavior every app inherits and may override.
